name: Solid Cut Roll
description: Child table row in Solid Fabric Cut Log. One row per fabric roll used in the cut. Records the roll ID, dye lot, and which piece types were cut from it for full traceability.

fields.label: Roll ID
fields.description: Roll barcode or serial number from the fabric bolt

fields.label: Dye Lot
fields.description: Dye lot code printed on the bolt label

fields.label: Yardage Used
fields.description: How many yards from this roll were cut

fields.label: Piece Types Cut
fields.description: e.g. Front Panel, Back Panel, Collar — which pieces came from this roll

fields.label: Notes
fields.description: Any defects, edge issues, colour inconsistencies noted on this roll
